title: Gridscale X | Siemens
body: Digital platform Gridscale X Purpose-built for true system operations, the Gridscale X platform connects planning, operations, and maintenance through a unified digital twin. It provides utilities with the speed, flexibility, and foresight required to manage growing complexity at scale and pave the way for autonomous grids. Explore products Contact us One platform to enable true system operations Gridscale X unifies grid planning, operations, asset management, and metering in a single, open and interoperable platform. Replacing siloed tools and disconnected workflows, it connects long-term planning with real-time operations through a common, scalable backbone, making insights reusable, workflows consistent, and complexity lower. The cloud-based Gridscale X platform forms the foundation of an open, evolving ecosystem and enables seamless integration of Siemens and third-party technologies as well as custom applications. It allows utilities to make faster decisions, innovate continuously, and reduce complexity and risk through shared services and harmonized data models that support true system operations. Why Gridscale X? One scalable backbone Evolve from grid operator to true system operator. Actively orchestrate increasingly complex energy systems, gain system‑wide visibility, and intelligently manage flexibility to reduce risk and maximize grid capacity fast. Speed Stay ahead of rising electricity demand through fully integrated planning and operational processes. Make accelerated, more confident, data-driven decisions to deliver fast, reliable grid connections. Flexibility Orchestrate assets smoothly to unlock additional operational flexibility. Run your networks closer to their limits and unlock additional capacity from existing infrastructure without compromising reliability. Foresight Move from reactive firefighting to integrated system operations that unify the entire grid management workflow. Make confident planning decisions based on system-wide visibility and reduced complexity. all One digital twin Ensure seamless collaboration and data exchange across the entire grid lifecycle with a common digital twin. Speed up planning cycles and grid-connection approvals. Make confident, data-driven decisions. all One modular framework Compose capabilities aligned with your current needs on a shared platform. Operate within a single architectural framework designed to make insights reusable, ensure consistent workflows, and evolve with your requirements. all One open ecosystem Focus on innovation by eliminating integration barriers in an evolving ecosystem that seamlessly combines existing solutions, cloud services, and a unique development foundation for individual solutions. Gridscale X for developers Build. integrate. innovate on one shared grid platform Build, integrate, and run your own applications directly on Gridscale X. With open APIs and reusable building blocks on a shared grid model, your development teams can deliver innovations faster. At the same time, you avoid stranded assets and legacy solutions as well as siloed custom applications. Explore Explore products Discover Gridscale X capabilities across planning, operations, and meter data management. Each solution adds targeted intelligence to improve transparency, efficiency, and reliability across increasingly complex power systems. Grid modelling Grid planning Grid operation Meter data management Select... Grid modelling Grid planning Grid operation Meter data management Consistent, accurate, up-to-date grid modelling A single source of truth aligns teams and workflows. Automated data synchronization and versioning reduce inconsistencies, cut errors, streamline workflows, and support reliable, data-driven operations. Network Model Manager Establish a single source of truth for network model data. Infuse extra speed, precision, and efficiency into your grid planning, development, and operation. Gridscale X Protection Data Manager Gain full transparency of your protection relays and settings. Automate data imports to reduce your workload and save up to 80% of time compared to manual entry. Agile and confident grid planning Advanced analytics and simulation improve planning speed, accuracy, and reliability. Full grid transparency and behind-the-meter DER visibility reveal grid constraints early and help optimize investments, increase resilience, and prepare the grid for future demands. Gridscale X LV Insights Gridscale X LV Insights is a SaaS for next-level grid transparency. Create a Digital Twin of your LV grid to enhance your usable grid capacity within weeks. Gridscale X DER Insights Turn grid blind spots into foresight. Uncover behind-the-meter DERs and their impact to protect infrastructure, increase capacity, and prevent unexpected issues. PSS SINCAL All-in-one simulation software for electric and pipe networks. Analyze low, medium, and high-voltage networks independently or simultaneously. PSS E PSS E is an industry-leading transmission planning and analysis software. Achieve unparalleled accuracy and unmatched automation with over 2,000+ open APIs. PSS E Cloud X Accelerate transmission planning performance: Gridscale X PSS E SaaS speeds up complex simulations, enables secure collaboration, and supports remote working. Faster, more efficient grid operations Real-time visibility and automated control improve grid stability and efficiency. Dynamic ratings, advanced protection and security assessments as well as flexibility management enable better congestion handling, optimized asset use, and reliable operation under changing conditions. Gridscale X LV Management Handle outages faster, digitalize efficiently, and enhance grid stability in your low-voltage grid with your smart co-pilot: Gridscale X LV Management. Gridscale X Flexibility Manager Gridscale X Flexibility Manager helps DSOs forecast grid risks, coordinate flexibility, and prevent congestion. Gridscale X Dynamic Line Rating Unlock your grid’s hidden capacity. Increase it by 10-15% with real-time line ratings based on current local weather and ambient conditions. Gridscale X Advanced Protection Assessment Access the world's largest library of 7,300+ relay models to power accurate and efficient protection simulations and analyses. Gridscale X Dynamic Security Assessment Gridscale X Dynamic Security Assessment delivers real-time grid stability insights for operations and planning purposes to enhance situational awareness. Smart, scalable meter data management Advanced meter data management and prepayment capabilities improve billing accuracy, revenue assurance and customer transparency. Automated data processing and integration streamline operations, reduce losses and support efficient management of energy and water services. Gridscale X Prepay Boost profitability with a modern engagement and budgeting software designed to protect utility revenue and puts consumers in control of their budget. Gridscale X Meter Data Management Simplify metering operations with high-quality data automation. Our scalable, vendor-agnostic MDM improves billing accuracy and future-proofs your architecture. Gridscale X Meter Data Management for Water The vendor-agnostic meter data management solution for water utilities. Get actionable data to detect leaks and reduce non-technical water revenue loss.
